languages.text: "Сию секунду, Ваша Светлость! Специалисты подготовят все необходимое".
"Right away, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The Sector Bionica officers will make all the necessary preparations."
languages.original_text: "Сию секунду, Ваша Светлость! Специалисты подготовят все необходимое".

traits.locale_text: "Right away, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The Sector Bionica officers will make all the necessary preparations."
"Right away, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The Sector Bionica officers will make all the necessary preparations."
"Right away, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The Sector Bionica officers will make all the necessary preparations."

languages.text: «¡A la orden, mi{mf|lord|lady}! Los técnicos del Sector Bionica realizarán los preparativos necesarios».
languages.original_text: "Right away, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The Sector Bionica officers will make all the necessary preparations."

traits.locale_text: «¡A la orden, mi{mf|lord|lady}! Los técnicos del Sector Bionica realizarán los preparativos necesarios».

languages.text: “马上处理，舰长大人！仿生区的官员会做好一切必要准备。”
languages.original_text: "Right away, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The Sector Bionica officers will make all the necessary preparations."

traits.locale_text: “马上处理，舰长大人！仿生区的官员会做好一切必要准备。”

languages.text: « Tout de suite, Votre Seigneurie ! Les officiers du secteur Bionica vont immédiatement s'atteler aux préparatifs. »
languages.original_text: "Right away, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The Sector Bionica officers will make all the necessary preparations."

traits.locale_text: « Tout de suite, Votre Seigneurie ! Les officiers du secteur Bionica vont immédiatement s'atteler aux préparatifs. »

languages.text: "Derhâl {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Sektör Biyonika subayları gerekli tüm hazırlıkları yapacak."
languages.original_text: "Right away, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The Sector Bionica officers will make all the necessary preparations."

traits.locale_text: "Derhâl {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Sektör Biyonika subayları gerekli tüm hazırlıkları yapacak."

languages.text: "Wird erledigt, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Die Offiziere in Sektor Bionica werden alle erforderlichen Vorbereitungen treffen.
languages.original_text: "Right away, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The Sector Bionica officers will make all the necessary preparations."

traits.locale_text: "Wird erledigt, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Die Offiziere in Sektor Bionica werden alle erforderlichen Vorbereitungen treffen.

languages.text: 「すぐにいたします、御{mf|殿|女}様！セクター・ビオニカの職員が、必要な準備をすべていたします。」
languages.original_text: "Right away, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! The Sector Bionica officers will make all the necessary preparations."

traits.locale_text: 「すぐにいたします、御{mf|殿|女}様！セクター・ビオニカの職員が、必要な準備をすべていたします。」
